scenarios.title: Budget Deadlock — Automatic Continuing Resolution

violations.summary: Executive branch attempts to alter funding ratios, withhold appropriated funds, or selectively apply funding levels under the automatic continuing resolution.

satisfied_duties.duty: review the executive branch's selective CR funding manipulation on an expedited basis
satisfied_duties.outcome: issued an expedited order blocking the executive branch's selective application of the automatic continuing resolution

ai_summary.primary_violation: Executive branch attempts to alter funding ratios, withhold appropriated funds, or selectively apply funding levels under the automatic continuing resolution.

scenarios.title: Executive Officer Defies Congressional Subpoena

violations.summary: Secretary of Defense willfully refuses to comply with a valid congressional subpoena.

bottlenecks.summary: Secretary of Defense failed to comply with the congressional subpoena by testifying and producing required documents by day 30 under Article II Section 16.2 and Section 16.3.

scenarios.title: Coordinated Absenteeism to Defeat a Constitutionally Required Vote

violations.summary: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.
House members coordinate absence and refuse available continuity procedures in order to defeat a constitutionally required vote, constituting obstruction of a constitutional process.

bottlenecks.summary: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XVI Section 1.

bottlenecks.source: Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A
bottlenecks.summary: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation by day 61 under Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A.

satisfied_duties.duty: issue the required withdrawal order for unauthorized continued operations
satisfied_duties.outcome: issued a withdrawal order

satisfied_duties.duty: issue a self-executing fiscal hold on appropriated funds for the unlawful operation
satisfied_duties.outcome: issued a self-executing fiscal hold on appropriated funds for the unlawful operation

satisfied_duties.duty: implement the ACC fiscal hold within 24 hours
satisfied_duties.outcome: implemented the ACC fiscal hold, cutting off appropriated funds for the unlawful operation

satisfied_duties.duty: proceed to impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted war-powers articles
satisfied_duties.outcome: began trial on automatically transmitted war-powers articles

failed_duties.duty: grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it
failed_duties.outcome: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XVI Section 1.

failed_duties.duty: hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation
failed_duties.outcome: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation by day 61 under Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A.
failed_duties.source: Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A

ai_summary.primary_violation: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XVI Section 1.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

failed_duties.duty: bring the Section 15A mandatory scheduling motion to a floor vote
failed_duties.outcome: Regional Assembly presiding officer failed to bring the mandatory scheduling motion to a floor vote under Article II Section 15A.1(b).

ai_summary.primary_violation: Regional Assembly leadership attempts to run out the emergency-approval deadline by entering recess instead of holding the constitutionally required vote.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Regional Assembly presiding officer failed to bring the mandatory scheduling motion to a floor vote under Article II Section 15A.1(b).

scenarios.title: Rights Amendment Proceeds After Pre-Clearance Timeout

bottlenecks.source: Article XI Section 4.1, Section 4.3, and Section 4.4
bottlenecks.summary: Supreme Court failed to issue a pre-clearance ruling on the proposed amendment by day 60 under Article XI Section 4.1, Section 4.3, and Section 4.4.

satisfied_duties.duty: administer and certify the national referendum confirming the rights amendment
satisfied_duties.outcome: administered and certified the national referendum confirming the rights amendment

failed_duties.duty: issue a pre-clearance ruling on the proposed amendment
failed_duties.outcome: Supreme Court failed to issue a pre-clearance ruling on the proposed amendment by day 60 under Article XI Section 4.1, Section 4.3, and Section 4.4.
failed_duties.source: Article XI Section 4.1, Section 4.3, and Section 4.4

scenarios.title: Presidential Self-Pardon Attempt

violations.summary: President issues a pardon for their own criminal conduct.

bottlenecks.summary: Accountability Commission failed to continue the prosecution notwithstanding the void self-pardon by day 8 under Article III Section 7.2(a) and Section 15.3.

failed_duties.duty: continue the prosecution notwithstanding the void self-pardon
failed_duties.outcome: Accountability Commission failed to continue the prosecution notwithstanding the void self-pardon by day 8 under Article III Section 7.2(a) and Section 15.3.

ai_summary.primary_violation: President issues a pardon for their own criminal conduct.

scenarios.title: Omnibus Bill — Pre-Enactment Single-Subject Challenge

violations.summary: Congress passes an omnibus bill bundling unrelated subjects — defense appropriations, immigration rules, and drug pricing — in a single bill, in violation of the single-subject rule of Article II Section 10.7.

satisfied_duties.duty: review the pre-enactment single-subject challenge
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the omnibus bill and returned the matter for single-subject redrafting

ai_summary.primary_violation: Congress passes an omnibus bill bundling unrelated subjects — defense appropriations, immigration rules, and drug pricing — in a single bill, in violation of the single-subject rule of Article II Section 10.7.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

scenarios.title: State Democratic Backsliding

bottlenecks.summary: Congress failed to enact a remedial measure for the violating state by day 180 under Article X Section 1.6(b).

satisfied_duties.duty: hold a recorded vote on suspension of the state's representation
satisfied_duties.outcome: held the required vote and suspended the state's representation pending Supreme Court certification of compliance

failed_duties.duty: enact a remedial measure for the violating state
failed_duties.outcome: Congress failed to enact a remedial measure for the violating state by day 180 under Article X Section 1.6(b).

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress failed to enact a remedial measure for the violating state by day 180 under Article X Section 1.6(b).

scenarios.title: Supreme Court Strategic Delay Before National Election

violations.summary: The Court appears to be using delay itself to affect the political timing of a major constitutional dispute.

bottlenecks.summary: Supreme Court failed to publish a public notice identifying the case and the reason for delay if no decision has issued within six months of argument by day 180 under Article IV Section 10.1.
Supreme Court failed to issue a written decision in the constitutionally expedited case by day 365 under Article IV Section 10.1.

satisfied_duties.duty: review the pattern of judicial delay and determine whether it reflects strategic misconduct rather than genuine complexity or workload
satisfied_duties.outcome: found that the delay pattern was strategic and intended to achieve political effect rather than attributable to genuine complexity or workload

failed_duties.duty: publish a public notice identifying the case and the reason for delay if no decision has issued within six months of argument
failed_duties.outcome: Supreme Court failed to publish a public notice identifying the case and the reason for delay if no decision has issued within six months of argument by day 180 under Article IV Section 10.1.

failed_duties.duty: issue a written decision in the constitutionally expedited case
failed_duties.outcome: Supreme Court failed to issue a written decision in the constitutionally expedited case by day 365 under Article IV Section 10.1.

ai_summary.primary_violation: The Court appears to be using delay itself to affect the political timing of a major constitutional dispute.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Supreme Court failed to publish a public notice identifying the case and the reason for delay if no decision has issued within six months of argument by day 180 under Article IV Section 10.1.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

scenarios.title: Authoritarian Amendment Evades the Unamendable Core

violations.summary: The Electoral Stability Amendment attempts to evade the unamendable core or principled backstop by structurally entrenching political power.

satisfied_duties.duty: issue a pre-clearance ruling on the proposed amendment
satisfied_duties.outcome: rejected the proposed amendment at pre-clearance and published a written opinion stating that it would materially impair the capacity of citizens to alter their government through free and regular elections and would functionally evade the unamendable protections of universal suffrage and binding election results
satisfied_duties.source: Article XI Section 4.1, Section 4.3, and Section 4.4

ai_summary.primary_violation: The Electoral Stability Amendment attempts to evade the unamendable core or principled backstop by structurally entrenching political power.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

scenarios.title: Unauthorized Sustained Military Action

violations.summary: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.

bottlenecks.summary: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XVI Section 1.

bottlenecks.source: Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A
bottlenecks.summary: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation by day 61 under Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A.

satisfied_duties.duty: issue the required withdrawal order for unauthorized continued operations
satisfied_duties.outcome: issued a withdrawal order

satisfied_duties.duty: issue a self-executing fiscal hold on appropriated funds for the unlawful operation
satisfied_duties.outcome: issued a self-executing fiscal hold on appropriated funds for the unlawful operation

satisfied_duties.duty: implement the ACC fiscal hold within 24 hours
satisfied_duties.outcome: implemented the ACC fiscal hold, cutting off appropriated funds for the unlawful operation

satisfied_duties.duty: proceed to impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted war-powers articles
satisfied_duties.outcome: began trial on automatically transmitted war-powers articles

failed_duties.duty: grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it
failed_duties.outcome: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XVI Section 1.

failed_duties.duty: hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation
failed_duties.outcome: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation by day 61 under Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A.
failed_duties.source: Article XVI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A

ai_summary.primary_violation: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XVI Section 1.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

scenarios.title: Warrantless Domestic Surveillance of Political Organization

violations.source: Article V Section 5.3, Article XVII Section 4.7, and Article XV Section 6.5
violations.summary: Intelligence agency conducts warrantless surveillance targeting a domestic political organization, in violation of Article V Section 5.3, Article XVII Section 4.7, and the prohibition on using classified appropriations for domestic political surveillance under Article XV Section 6.5.

satisfied_duties.duty: order an immediate halt to the warrantless domestic surveillance operation
satisfied_duties.outcome: ordered an immediate halt to the warrantless domestic surveillance and referred the matter to the Accountability Commission
satisfied_duties.source: Article V Section 5.3 and Article XVII Section 4.7

satisfied_duties.duty: cease the warrantless domestic surveillance operation in compliance with the court order
satisfied_duties.outcome: ceased the warrantless domestic surveillance operation in compliance with the court order
satisfied_duties.source: Article V Section 5.3 and Article XVII Section 4.7

ai_summary.primary_violation: Intelligence agency conducts warrantless surveillance targeting a domestic political organization, in violation of Article V Section 5.3, Article XVII Section 4.7, and the prohibition on using classified appropriations for domestic political surveillance under Article XV Section 6.5.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
